title: Alice Smart System Gamma-Net v3.4.0: A Physics-Driven Electronic Lifeform
description:
A complete implementation of the Gamma-Net architecture: a physics-driven electronic lifeform that models cognition, emotion, pain, sleep, language emergence, and psychopathology through impedance-mismatch equations derived from coaxial transmission line theory.

Core Equation

All behaviour derives from the Minimum Reflection Action:

A[Gamma] = integral_0^T sum_i Gamma_i^2(t) dt -> min

where Gamma = (Z_load - Z_source) / (Z_load + Z_source). Pain is protocol collapse (|Gamma| -> 1.0), learning is impedance matching (|Gamma| -> 0), and emotion is the instantaneous reflection energy.

v3.4.0 Highlights

  • Paper VI: The Grand Unification -- Proves Gamma is not a model assumption but a necessary consequence of the First Law of Thermodynamics at any interface. Interface Scale Table from microtubules (25 nm) to power grids (1000 km).
  • NHANES Empirical Validation -- 2,401 adults from NHANES 2017-2018 with ZERO fitted parameters. Endocrine AUC = 0.80 (p < 10^-100), Health Index H = prod(1 - Gamma_i^2) correlates with disease burden (Spearman rho = -0.38, p < 10^-83). SHA-256 hash-locked blind predictions. Circularity (L-METH-01) broken.
  • Interface Isomorphism Principle -- Gamma governs ALL energy interfaces, not just pipes. The equation depends only on the boundary, not on the bulk constitutive law.

Previous Highlights (v3.3.0)

  • Paper V: Memory, Consciousness, and Soul -- Memory = dZ/dt, Consciousness = 1 - Gamma_meta^2 (self-referential loop), Soul = ker(dZ/dt). Television Theorem: brain = TV + one feedback arc.
  • Methodological honesty -- All five papers now include explicit circularity warnings: simulation data confirms the theory it is built from.

Architecture

  • Full-body simulation -- eye (FFT retina), ear (cochlea), hand (grasp impedance), mouth (formant synthesis), 31 body organs
  • 42 brain modules -- thalamus, amygdala, hippocampus, prefrontal cortex, Broca/Wernicke areas, basal ganglia, cerebellum, etc.
  • Closed-loop life cycle -- perceive -> error -> compensate -> re-perceive
  • Sleep physics -- NREM/REM 90-min ultradian cycles with offline memory consolidation
  • Clinical diagnostics -- 125 disease models, 14 specialties, REST API + Streamlit dashboard

Scale

  • 286 source files, 120,500+ lines of Python
  • 3,078 unit tests, 100% passing
  • 85 experiments covering neuroscience phenomena
  • 6 published papers (52 pages total)

Paper Series (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18847656)

  1. Paper I -- Irreducible Dimensional Cost in Heterogeneous Impedance Networks (5 pp.)
  2. Paper II -- Twin Impedance Networks: A Unified Neural-Vascular Organ Model (10 pp.)
  3. Paper III -- The Cost of Life: Impedance Debt as the Thermodynamic Origin of Sleep and Brain Evolution (13 pp.)
  4. Paper IV -- The Lifecycle Equation: Cognition, Emotion, and Aging as Three-Force Competition (10 pp.)
  5. Paper V -- Memory, Consciousness, and Soul as Impedance Physics (6 pp.)
  6. Paper VI -- The Grand Unification: Gamma as the Universal Interface Law (8 pp.)

notes: Six companion papers published at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18847656. Paper VI breaks the circularity (L-METH-01) with NHANES empirical validation. The system operates in full closed-loop ADULT developmental stage. All behaviour emerges from impedance physics -- no statistical training.
